name: DriveTime Used Cars
description_short: DriveTime is a national used car dealer offering in-house auto financing for all credit backgrounds. 147 locations, online pre-qualification with no credit impact.
description_long:
DriveTime is a national used car dealership chain built around integrated in-house auto financing, specifically designed to serve buyers across the full credit spectrum. With 147 dealerships across the country and over 7,200 vehicles available online, the company has approved millions of customers and positions itself as an accessible alternative to traditional dealerships that rely on third-party bank financing. Its entire business model centers on making car ownership possible for people who have been declined elsewhere.

The company offers a complete car-buying and financing experience. Shoppers can browse inventory online, obtain a fully personalized down payment and monthly payment estimate without a hard credit pull, and complete most of the financing process before visiting a dealership. Every vehicle includes a free AutoCheck vehicle history report, no-haggle pricing, and a 5-day return guarantee. Trade-in valuations are also available online, and the company provides a 30-day/1,500-mile limited warranty on all purchases.

What distinguishes DriveTime is its transparency around financing terms prior to a dealership visit. The company claims its required down payments average $1,000 less than the broader market for financed used car sales, based on a comparison with 2024 nationwide data. On-site finance experts at every location and a no-pressure sales model are positioned as differentiators from traditional high-pressure dealership environments. A mobile app supports the full shopping experience, and the 5-day return guarantee is a consumer protection rarely offered in the subprime auto segment.

DriveTime fills a real gap for credit-challenged buyers who need transportation and cannot qualify at a bank or credit union. However, the website does not disclose APR ranges, loan terms, or financing fees — a significant omission for a company whose core pitch is financing. In-house financing at dealerships like DriveTime typically carries higher interest rates than conventional auto loans, which meaningfully increases the total cost of vehicle ownership. The 30-day warranty is also limited in scope and duration. For buyers who have exhausted conventional financing options and need a vehicle with basic purchase protections, DriveTime is a structured, consumer-friendly option — but borrowers should request and compare the full APR before signing.
pros: Get personalized down payment and monthly payment online with no hard credit pull
Claims down payments average $1,000 less than the broader market based on 2024 national data
5-day return guarantee on all purchased vehicles
30-day/1,500-mile limited warranty included on every car
Free AutoCheck vehicle history report on every listing
147 dealerships nationwide with in-house finance experts on-site
cons: APR ranges, loan terms, and financing fees are not disclosed anywhere on the website
In-house dealership financing typically carries higher rates than bank or credit union auto loans
Inventory is limited to used vehicles only — no new cars
30-day/1,500-mile warranty is narrow in both scope and duration
147 locations does not cover all US markets, limiting accessibility
best_for: Buyers with bad credit, no credit, or recent derogatory marks who cannot qualify at a bank
Car shoppers who want to know real financing terms before setting foot in a dealership
First-time car buyers seeking a no-pressure, structured purchase experience
Consumers who need a vehicle quickly and want a return window as a safety net
diagnosis: DriveTime is best for subprime borrowers or credit-thin consumers who need a used vehicle and want financing clarity before visiting a dealership. The main caveat is that interest rates are never disclosed online and in-house dealership financing almost always runs higher than bank or credit union alternatives — buyers must request the full APR and compare before committing.
services: Used car sales (sedans, trucks, vans, SUVs)
In-house auto financing for all credit backgrounds
Online pre-qualification with no hard credit pull
Personalized down payment and monthly payment calculator
Mobile app for browsing inventory and financing
On-site finance experts at each dealership location
